span.p:
Update Entity Record
Employee.risk_score = score
OR CardProfile.risk_score = score
(app schema)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
UPSERT EntityRiskScore
metrics.entity_risk_scores
SCD Type 1 — latest state

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
APPEND RiskScoreHistory
metrics.risk_score_history
Time-series for trend analysis

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Normalize
normalizer = count * max_weight(3.0)
score = total / normalizer

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Clamp to 0.0-1.0
max(0.0, min(1.0, score))
Round to 6 decimal places

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Resolve Rule Category
RULE_MAP[rule_id].category
Fallback: unknown

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Accumulate Per Category
category_weighted_sum[cat] += weighted
category_weight_total[cat] += weight

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Factor Contributions
factors[cat] = cat_sum / normalizer
Shows which risk categories dominate

Timedelta in days

Weighted Score
normalized(0-1) * weight
Per-alert contribution

span.p:
Extract Severity
low | medium | high | critical
Base score multiplier

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Extract Amount
amount_cents from alert
Value-scaled contribution

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Extract Details
JSON details field
Rule-specific context

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
compute_risk_score()
severity + amount + details
Returns: 0-100 integer

Query Active Alerts
SELECT FROM alerts
WHERE merchant_id AND entity_id

span.p:
Exclude Cleared Alerts
Subquery: latest alert_history status
Filter OUT: dismissed, false_positive
